verdicts.expected: BOYSPH01 is spherical buoy,general ,full-chart. It is used as a cardinal buoy used to indicate the safe side of danger. Required geometry: spherical buoy body. Required colours: red, black.
verdicts.judge_comments: Repair restores the required red/black spherical buoy class and colour pair. Styling remains Helm-owned and this is not final approval.
verdicts.observed: Spherical buoy with red upper and black lower horizontal body, black outline, and stem; invented blue/grey is gone.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual rerun; keep pending final approval QA and do not mark final-approved.

verdicts.expected: BOYSPH65 is spherical buoy,red-white,full-chart. It is used as a safe-water buoy used to mark navigable water. Required geometry: spherical buoy body. Required colours: red, white with vertical bands/stripes in the listed colour order.
verdicts.judge_comments: Repair rotates the safe-water red/white spherical body to the required vertical stripe order. Not final-approved.
verdicts.observed: Spherical buoy with vertical red/white split, black outline, and stem.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual rerun; keep pending final approval QA and do not mark final-approved.

verdicts.judge_comments: Repair adds the missing lower red band and preserves the spherical buoy family. Not final-approved.
verdicts.observed: Spherical buoy with horizontal red-green-red bands and black outline/stem.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual rerun; keep pending final approval QA and do not mark final-approved.

verdicts.expected: BOYSPP11 is special purpose buoy, simplified. It is used as a special-purpose buoy used for named local purposes. Required geometry: pillar buoy body. Required colours: reference-defined.
verdicts.judge_comments: Repair preserves the required pillar/special-purpose class. The OpenCPN/S-101 witness is more compact, but the semantic shape and colour are now acceptable for rerun. Not final-approved.
verdicts.observed: Simplified yellow pillar special-purpose buoy cue with black outline and stem; generic black lower body is removed.
verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual rerun; keep pending final approval QA and do not mark final-approved.

verdicts.judge_comments: Repair replaces the generic body with the required conical/nun family cue. Not final-approved.

verdicts.required_change: No repair required for this visual rerun; keep pending final approval QA and do not mark final-approved.

verdicts.expected: BOYSPR01 is default spar buoy, full-chart. It is used as a cardinal buoy used to indicate the safe side of danger. Required geometry: spar buoy body. Required colours: white, black.
verdicts.judge_comments: Default spar buoy should use only the white/black spar body without extra external separator marks.
verdicts.observed: White/black spar body is present, but a long grey horizontal separator stroke protrudes far outside the narrow spar silhouette.
verdicts.required_change: Clip or remove the horizontal separator stroke so it does not extend outside the spar silhouette; preserve the white-over-black body.

verdicts.expected: BOYSPR70 is black/yellow/black spar buoy, full-chart. It is used as a cardinal buoy used to indicate the safe side of danger. Required geometry: spar buoy body. Required colours: black, yellow, black.
verdicts.judge_comments: Black/yellow/black spar must show the ordered body bands without external scaffold-like lines.
verdicts.observed: Black-yellow-black spar sequence is present, but two long grey separator strokes protrude outside the narrow spar body.
verdicts.required_change: Clip or remove the separator strokes outside the spar silhouette; preserve black-yellow-black band order.

verdicts.expected: BOYSPR71 is yellow/black/yellow spar buoy, full-chart. It is used as a cardinal buoy used to indicate the safe side of danger. Required geometry: spar buoy body. Required colours: yellow, black, yellow.
verdicts.judge_comments: Yellow/black/yellow spar must show the ordered body bands without external scaffold-like lines.
verdicts.observed: Yellow-black-yellow spar sequence is present, but two long grey separator strokes protrude outside the narrow spar body.
verdicts.required_change: Clip or remove the separator strokes outside the spar silhouette; preserve yellow-black-yellow band order.

verdicts.expected: BOYSPR72 is black/red/black spar buoy, full-chart. It is used as a isolated-danger buoy used to mark a hazard with navigable water around it. Required geometry: spar buoy body. Required colours: black, red, black.
verdicts.judge_comments: Black/red/black isolated-danger spar must show the ordered body bands without external scaffold-like lines.
verdicts.observed: Black-red-black spar sequence is present, but two long grey separator strokes protrude outside the narrow spar body.
verdicts.required_change: Clip or remove the separator strokes outside the spar silhouette; preserve black-red-black band order.

verdicts.expected: BOYSUP01 is super buoy, general, full-chart. It is used as a cardinal buoy used to indicate the safe side of danger. Required geometry: super-buoy body. Required colours: red, black.
verdicts.judge_comments: Super-buoy should retain the super-buoy reference silhouette first, then carry the red/black colour semantics.
verdicts.observed: Red/black rounded capsule buoy; it does not match the OpenCPN/S-101 super-buoy platform/trapezoid with ring cue.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw as the super-buoy platform/trapezoid/ring reference silhouette while preserving red/black load-bearing colours.

verdicts.expected: BOYSUP02 is super buoy, black, full-chart. It is used as a special-purpose buoy used for named local purposes. Required geometry: super-buoy body. Required colours: black.
verdicts.judge_comments: Black super-buoy should read as the reference super-buoy platform, not a generic rounded buoy body.
verdicts.observed: Solid black rounded capsule buoy; it does not match the black super-buoy platform/trapezoid reference silhouette.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw BOYSUP02 as the black super-buoy platform/trapezoid reference silhouette.

verdicts.expected: BOYSUP03 is LANBY, super-buoy, paper-chart. It is used as a special-purpose buoy used for named local purposes. Required geometry: buoy symbol matching the S-57 buoy family. Required colours: red, black.
verdicts.judge_comments: LANBY paper-chart super-buoy needs the reference super-buoy body plus the distinctive top cue.
verdicts.observed: Red/black rounded capsule with a small cap/top stem; it misses the LANBY star/asterisk top cue and platform-shaped super-buoy body.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw with the super-buoy platform silhouette and the LANBY star/asterisk topmark cue; preserve red/black colour semantics.

verdicts.expected: BOYSUP65 is super buoy, red, white, full-chart. It is used as a special-purpose buoy used for named local purposes. Required geometry: super-buoy body. Required colours: red, white with vertical bands/stripes in the listed colour order.
verdicts.judge_comments: Red/white super-buoy must preserve vertical stripes on the reference super-buoy silhouette.
verdicts.observed: Vertical red/white striping is fixed, but the body remains a rounded capsule rather than the super-buoy platform/trapezoid witness.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw on the super-buoy platform/trapezoid reference body while preserving vertical red/white order.

verdicts.expected: BRIDGE01 is symbol for opening bridge. It is used as a symbol for opening bridge. Required geometry: symbol silhouette must match the strongest S-101/OpenCPN/Aqua Map reference. Required colours: reference-defined.
verdicts.judge_comments: Opening bridge should match the magenta ring/circular reference silhouette without invented crosshair detail.
verdicts.observed: Magenta circular ring is present, but the candidate adds a black crosshair/target center instead of the S-101/OpenCPN opening-bridge ring/diagonal cue.
verdicts.required_change: Remove the invented black crosshair/target detail and redraw the opening-bridge ring to match the S-101/OpenCPN witness.

verdicts.expected: BRTHNO01 is berth number symbol. It is used as a berth number symbol. Required geometry: symbol silhouette must match the strongest S-101/OpenCPN/Aqua Map reference. Required colours: reference-defined.
verdicts.judge_comments: Berth-number reference is a magenta circular symbol/placeholder; it should not bake in literal “No” text.
verdicts.observed: Black outlined circle containing literal “No” text.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw as the magenta berth-number circular reference cue and remove the invented text.

verdicts.expected: BUAARE02 is built-up area. It is used as a built-up area. Required geometry: symbol silhouette must match the strongest S-101/OpenCPN/Aqua Map reference. Required colours: reference-defined.
verdicts.judge_comments: Built-up-area reference is a compact brown filled area/dot cue, not a framed block cluster.
verdicts.observed: White square frame with multiple brown building blocks and a diagonal slash.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw as the built-up-area brown filled area/dot reference cue; remove the square frame and block-cluster/slash treatment.

verdicts.expected: BUIREL01 is non-conspicuous religious building, Christian. It is used as a non-conspicuous religious building, Christian. Required geometry: symbol silhouette must match the strongest S-101/OpenCPN/Aqua Map reference. Required colours: reference-defined.
verdicts.judge_comments: Non-conspicuous Christian religious-building witness is a brown cross/church cue, not a black filled building pictogram.
verdicts.observed: Black filled church/building silhouette with cross.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw to the brown Christian cross/church schematic reference cue rather than a filled building silhouette.

verdicts.expected: BUIREL04 is non-conspicuous religious building, non-Christian. It is used as a non-conspicuous religious building, non-Christian. Required geometry: symbol silhouette must match the strongest S-101/OpenCPN/Aqua Map reference. Required colours: reference-defined.
verdicts.judge_comments: Non-Christian religious-building witness is a brown schematic/temple cue, not a black filled dome pictogram.
verdicts.observed: Black domed building silhouette with white columns.
verdicts.required_change: Redraw to the brown non-Christian religious-building schematic reference cue.

verdicts.required_change: Redraw to the mosque/minaret crescent/reference cue and avoid the generic filled building silhouette.

verdicts.expected: BUISGL01 is single building. It is used as a single building. Required geometry: symbol silhouette must match the strongest S-101/OpenCPN/Aqua Map reference. Required colours: brown.

verdicts.expected: BUISGL11 is conspicuous single building. It is used as a conspicuous single building. Required geometry: symbol silhouette must match the strongest S-101/OpenCPN/Aqua Map reference. Required colours: black.
verdicts.judge_comments: Conspicuous single-building reference is a compact black square/building cue; the roof/door house pictogram changes the chart symbol.

verdicts.expected: BUNSTA01 is bunker station, diesel oil station. It is used as a bunker station, diesel oil station. Required geometry: symbol silhouette must match the strongest S-101/OpenCPN/Aqua Map reference. Required colours: white, black.
verdicts.judge_comments: Repair replaces the diamond placeholder with the bunker diesel fuel/service-station silhouette seen in the OpenCPN witness. Not final-approved.

verdicts.judge_comments: Bunker-water reference is a small water bucket/tap/service-station cue, not a generic droplet.
